title: Fully recyclable Brønsted acid catalyst systems
author_string: Watson, Christopher B., Kuechle, Adrianna, Bergbreiter, David E.
abstract: Polyisobutylene-bound sulfonic acid are effective homogeneous Brønsted acid catalysts and they and a poly(alpha-olefin) (PAO) solvent are readily recyclable with simple product removal by extraction or distillation.
